center.name: 阿劳卡省
center.summary: 阿劳卡省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Orange-chinned parakeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: exsul is found in northeastern Colombia's Arauca Department and northern and western Venezuela as far as Guárico

links.evidence: exsul is found in northeastern Colombia's Arauca Department and northern and western Venezuela as far as Guárico
